reference: The gallbladder stores bile, which helps in the digestion of fats. I would suggest decreasing your fat intake since your gallbladder is removed. And with every episode of diarrhea, replenish your salt and minerals with oral rehydration solutions, etc.
text: The gallbladder stores bile, which helps in the digestion of fats. I would suggest decreasing your fat intake since your gallbladder is removed. And with every episode of diarrhea, replenish your salt and minerals with hydration solutions, etc.
